summary: Multi-page React website for YMW Compliance Services LLP — India's #1 Trusted Compliance & Registration Partner based in Dhanbad, Jharkhand. Pages: Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance Section, Social Media, Signup/Login, Customer Dashboard, and Admin Panel. Home page includes Hero Section, About Preview, Services Preview (15 services), Why Choose Us stats, Our Strengths section, and Contact Preview. Includes navigation, grievance submission form, blog listing, services showcase, social media links, customer authentication system (signup with Full Name, Mobile, Email, Password, Business Name; login with Email/Password), protected customer dashboard (welcome message, profile info, service selection, document upload, WhatsApp support), persistent customer accounts in backend, and admin panel to view registered customers and service requests. Color scheme: Dark Navy Blue (#0a1628) background, Golden Yellow (#f5c518) accent, white text, green WhatsApp button, diagonal stripe texture on hero.
architectural_notes: Multi-page React app with client-side routing
Color theme: Dark Navy Blue (#0a1628) background, Golden Yellow (#f5c518) accent, white text, green (#22c55e) WhatsApp buttons
Background color (#0a1628 dark navy) and font must remain consistent across all pages — do not override
Floating WhatsApp and Call Now buttons should be rendered in the root layout so they appear on every page
SEO: use React Helmet or equivalent for per-page meta/OG tags; add JSON-LD structured data for LocalBusiness schema

Customer auth system: Email/Password signup & login with persistent accounts in Motoko backend; protected dashboard route only accessible to logged-in users; admin panel for viewing registered customers and service requests

Authentication fix: service request submission must use authenticated session token (not anonymous); logged-in user ID must be passed with each service request; non-logged-in users must be redirected to /login
known_issues: Services page/preview not showing all 15 services — some are hidden or missing after recent changes
Auth bug: after login, service request submission fails with 'Unauthorized: Anonymous callers cannot submit service requests' — session not properly passed to backend API call
Services page: service cards have inconsistent vertical spacing, some cards start lower than others, content alignment inside cards is inconsistent

existing_features.title: Create a persistent top navigation bar with links to all pages: Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance, Social Media, and Signup. The nav should highlight the active page and collapse into a mobile-friendly hamburger menu on small screens.
Create a Home page with a hero section (headline, sub-headline, and a call-to-action button), a brief overview section highlighting key site offerings, and a footer.
Create an About page with a mission statement, team/organization introduction section, and core values displayed as a grid of cards.
Create a Services page that showcases available services as a grid of cards, each with an icon, title, and short description.

Create a Blog page that lists blog post previews (title, date, excerpt, and a 'Read More' link). Each post should open a detail view or expand inline. Store blog posts in the Motoko backend with endpoints to list and retrieve posts.
Create a Contact page with a contact form (Name, Email, Subject, Message fields) and a submit button. Submitted contact messages should be stored in the Motoko backend.

Create a Grievance Section page with a grievance submission form (Name, Email, Grievance Category dropdown, Description textarea, and Submit button). Store submitted grievances in the Motoko backend with a unique ID and timestamp. Display a confirmation with a reference number after submission.

Create a Social Media page that displays a grid of social media platform cards (e.g., Twitter/X, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube), each with a platform icon, name, handle/description, and an external link button.

Create a Signup page with Internet Identity authentication. The page should show a prominent 'Sign Up / Login with Internet Identity' button. After successful authentication, display the user's principal ID and a welcome message. Allow the authenticated principal to be stored in the backend upon first login.

Apply a cohesive, modern civic/professional visual theme across all pages: use a warm neutral palette with a strong accent color (e.g., deep teal or forest green), clean sans-serif typography, consistent card and section styling, and a professional layout that conveys trust and community engagement.
Generate and render a hero background banner image for the Home page and a site logo/icon, stored as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated.

Update the Home page Hero Section with: Title 'YMW Compliance Services', Subtitle 'India's #1 Trusted Compliance & Registration Partner', and two CTA buttons — 'Contact Us' (links to /contact) and 'WhatsApp Now' (links to WhatsApp number 8102906339).

Add an About Preview section on the Home page with the heading 'Dhanbad's Most Trusted Compliance Partner' and the full descriptive text about YMW Compliance Services LLP, including details about being a Dhanbad, Jharkhand-based startup offering 100+ professional services, being a one-stop solution for legal registrations and compliance, and being a subsidiary of YMW Group under the leadership of Mr. Kundan Kumar with 15+ years of experience. Include a 'Learn More' button linking to the /about page.

Add a Services Preview section on the Home page displaying all 15 services as cards or a grid: Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service, FSSAI License, Trademark Registration, Pollution Control Board, Tender Services, Digital Signature Certificate, Agreement & Contract, Small Business Support Service. Include a 'View All Services' button linking to /services.
Add a 'Why Choose Us' section on the Home page with three stat highlights: '20,000+ Happy Clients', '15+ Years Experience', and '5 Star Rating', displayed as visually prominent stat cards or badges.

Add a Contact Preview section on the Home page displaying: Phone numbers 92792 42122 and 9241136368, WhatsApp numbers 8102906339 and 8102901690, and business hours (Monday to Saturday: 10:00 AM – 6:30 PM; Sunday: Closed; National Holidays: Closed). Include a 'Contact Us' button linking to /contact.

Redesign the global CSS theme and Tailwind configuration to use Dark Navy Blue (#0a1628 / #0d1f3c) as the primary background, Golden Yellow (#f5c518) as the accent/highlight color, white (#ffffff) for headings and primary text, light gray for body text, and deep navy for navbar background. Replace all existing civic-teal and civic-green color tokens with this dark navy + golden yellow palette. Apply this theme consistently across all pages: Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance, Social Media, Signup, Navigation, and Footer.

Redesign the Home page Hero section to match the uploaded screenshots exactly: dark navy background with a diagonal stripe texture pattern, a yellow badge pill reading 'India's #1 Compliance Partner', a large two-line headline 'Start Your Business With Experts' (with 'With Experts' in golden yellow), a subtitle 'India's Trusted Compliance Partner — Business Registration, GST, ISO, Trademark & More. Get expert guidance at every step.', three CTA buttons: 'Get Free Consultation' (yellow), 'Call: +91 8102906339' (dark outline), and 'WhatsApp Us' (green #22c55e with WhatsApp icon), and three badge pills at the bottom: '10,000+ Clients', 'All India Service', 'Expert Team'. On the right side of the hero, display a white card 'Get Free Expert Consultation' form with fields: Full Name, Phone Number (+91 prefix), Select Service dropdown (all 15 services as options), City/State, and a golden yellow 'Get Free Consultation' submit button with '100% Free & Confidential' note below it.

Redesign the Navigation bar to match the uploaded screenshots: dark navy (#0a1628) background, 'YMW' logo text in golden yellow with 'Compliance Services' in white and tagline 'Your Trusted Business Partner' in light gray below, navigation links (Home, Services with dropdown indicator, About, Blog, Contact, Social Media) in white, a phone number '+91 8102906339' with phone icon on the right, and a 'Get Free Consultation' golden yellow button on the far right. Remove Grievance and Signup from the primary nav links if present in top bar (they can remain accessible through other means).

Update the Footer component to use the dark navy (#0a1628) background with golden yellow (#f5c518) accent for headings and links, white body text, matching the overall dark navy + golden yellow theme applied site-wide.

Add a TanStack Query mutation hook useSubmitConsultationRequest in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts that calls the backend submitConsultationRequest function. Wire this hook to the consultation form in the Home page hero card so that on submission it calls the backend, shows a success toast/message, and resets the form.

Ensure the dark navy background color (#0a1628 / #0d1f3c) is consistently applied across all pages — Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance, Social Media, and Signup — with no page defaulting to a white, light, or different background color. No page-level background overrides should deviate from the global dark navy theme.

Ensure the same font family (as currently configured in the global stylesheet/Tailwind config) is consistently applied across all pages — Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance, Social Media, and Signup — with no page or component overriding the global font to a different typeface.

Add a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page, visible on all routes. The button should display the WhatsApp SVG icon in white on a green (#22c55e) circular background, link to 'https://wa.me/918102906339', open in a new tab, and include a tooltip label 'Chat on WhatsApp'. It must sit above the floating Call Now button (z-index stacking) and be fully touch-friendly (minimum 56px tap target).

Add a floating 'Call Now' button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page, positioned just above or adjacent to the WhatsApp floating button. The button should display a phone icon and the label 'Call Now', link to 'tel:9279242122', use the golden yellow (#f5c518) background with dark navy text, and be at least 56px tall. Place both floating action buttons in a shared FloatingCTA component rendered inside the Layout wrapper so they appear on every page without duplicating code.

Create a reusable ConsultationPopup modal component that auto-triggers after a 5-second delay on first page load (using sessionStorage to prevent re-showing after the user has dismissed or submitted it in the same session). The modal should contain the same consultation form fields as the hero card: Full Name, Phone Number (+91 prefix), Select Service dropdown (all 15 services), City/State, and a golden yellow 'Get Free Consultation' submit button. On submission, call the existing useSubmitConsultationRequest hook, show a success message, and close the modal. Include an 'X' close button. The modal must render inside the Layout wrapper and appear on all pages.

Create a reusable FreeConsultationSection component containing the same consultation form (Full Name, Phone Number with +91 prefix, Select Service dropdown with all 15 services, City/State, golden yellow submit button, '100% Free & Confidential' note) that uses the useSubmitConsultationRequest hook. Embed this component at the bottom of every page: About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance, Social Media, and Signup — so every page offers an inline free consultation form above the footer.

Add SEO meta tags to the site for India-targeted compliance and registration searches. Update frontend/index.html to include: a descriptive <title> tag ('YMW Compliance Services | Business Registration, GST, ISO, Trademark in India'), a <meta name='description'> with India-targeted compliance keywords, Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image pointing to the hero banner asset), Twitter Card meta tags, a <link rel='canonical'> tag, and a <meta name='keywords'> tag with terms like 'business registration India', 'GST registration Dhanbad', 'ISO certification Jharkhand', 'trademark registration India', 'compliance services India'. Also add a JSON-LD structured data script block of type 'LocalBusiness' with YMW Compliance Services details: name, address (Dhanbad, Jharkhand), phone (+91 9279242122), url, and description.

Optimize the frontend for fast loading: apply React.lazy() and Suspense for all 8 page components in App.tsx to enable route-based code splitting. Add loading='lazy' to all tags across all pages and components. Ensure the hero banner image and logo are preloaded using in index.html. Add a loading skeleton or spinner as the Suspense fallback that matches the dark navy theme. Ensure no unused CSS or large synchronous imports block initial render.

Ensure all pages and shared components (Navigation, Footer, FloatingCTA, FreeConsultationSection, ConsultationPopup) are fully mobile-responsive and touch-friendly. Audit and fix: Navigation hamburger menu must work on all screen sizes; all form inputs must be at least 44px tall on mobile; all grid layouts (services, about, why-choose-us, stats) must stack to a single column on screens < 640px; floating CTA buttons must not overlap form submit buttons or nav elements; all cards and sections must have appropriate padding on small screens; text must not overflow or truncate incorrectly on mobile viewports.

Make the site Google Ads landing-page ready: add a UTM parameter reader utility (or extend the existing frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts) that captures utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_term, and utm_content from the URL on page load and persists them to sessionStorage. Pre-fill the consultation forms (hero card, FreeConsultationSection, ConsultationPopup) with a hidden utm_source field and include UTM data in the form submission payload (extend the useSubmitConsultationRequest hook and corresponding backend call to accept an optional utmSource text field). Add a prominent 'Get Free Consultation' CTA button at the top of the Services page and About page that scrolls to or opens the inline consultation form. Ensure all pages have a clear, singular CTA above the fold suitable for paid traffic conversion.

Update the Services page (frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx) to display all 15 services as cards: Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service, FSSAI License, Trademark Registration, Pollution Control Board, Tender Services, Digital Signature Certificate, Agreement & Contract, and Small Business Support Service. Ensure no service is hidden, truncated, or cut off — all 15 cards must be fully visible and rendered in the grid.

Update the Services Preview section on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) to display all 15 services as cards or grid items: Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service, FSSAI License, Trademark Registration, Pollution Control Board, Tender Services, Digital Signature Certificate, Agreement & Contract, and Small Business Support Service. Ensure no service is hidden, truncated, or cut off — all 15 items must be fully visible. Include the existing 'View All Services' button linking to /services.

Update the 'Why Choose Us' stats section on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) to display the following four stat highlights: '15,000+ Happy Clients', '100+ Services Offered', '12+ Years Experience', and '5* Client Rating'. Replace any previous stat values (e.g., '20,000+ Happy Clients', '15+ Years Experience') with these exact updated figures. All four stats must be fully visible as prominently styled stat cards or badges consistent with the dark navy + golden yellow theme.

Add an 'Our Strengths' section to the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx), positioned between the 'Why Choose Us' stats section and the Contact Preview section. The section should have the heading 'Our Strengths', sub-heading 'Why 15,000+ Businesses Trust YMW', and a descriptor line 'We bring expertise, speed, and transparency to every compliance need'. Display six strength cards in a responsive grid (3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile) with the following entries: (1) 'Expert Professionals' — 'CA, CS & legal experts with years of industry experience'; (2) 'Pan India Service' — 'Serving clients across all 28 states & Union Territories'; (3) 'Affordable Pricing' — 'Transparent pricing with no hidden charges whatsoever'; (4) 'Fast Processing' — 'Quick turnaround with dedicated relationship managers'; (5) 'End-to-End Support' — 'From registration to annual compliance, we're with you'; (6) '100% Online Process' — 'Submit documents & track status from anywhere online'. Each card should include a relevant icon (e.g., a briefcase for Expert Professionals, a map pin for Pan India Service, a tag for Affordable Pricing, a clock for Fast Processing, a shield for End-to-End Support, a globe/cloud for 100% Online Process), the title in white/golden yellow, and the description in light gray. Style consistent with the dark navy (#0a1628) background and golden yellow (#f5c518) accent theme.

Redesign the 'Get in Touch' / CTA section on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) to exactly match the uploaded screenshot (image-2.png): solid golden yellow (#f5c518) full-width background, large bold dark navy (#0a1628) heading 'Ready to Start Your Business Journey?' using the same Poppins/Inter font as the rest of the site, a subtitle in dark navy 'Get expert guidance today — 100% free consultation, no obligations', three horizontally-arranged CTA buttons: (1) 'Get Free Consultation' with a phone icon on dark navy (#0a1628) background with white text, (2) 'Call: +91 8102906339 / 9279242122' with a phone icon on dark navy (#0a1628) background with white text — where the call button links to tel:9279242122, (3) 'WhatsApp Us' with a WhatsApp/message icon on green (#22c55e) background with white text linking to https://wa.me/918102906339 opening in a new tab, and three trust badge lines below the buttons: '✓ No registration fee', '✓ Expert advice', '✓ Response within 30 minutes' in dark navy text. All text, fonts, and button styles must be consistent with the rest of the site (Poppins/Inter font family). The section must be fully responsive — buttons stack vertically on mobile screens < 640px. Do not alter any other section on the Home page.

In the Home page hero consultation card (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx), update the 'Get Free Consultation' heading and its subtitle 'Fill the form — our expert will call you back' text block so that it has a golden yellow (#f5c518) background to visually highlight it. The heading text should be dark navy (#0a1628) to remain legible against the yellow background. Apply appropriate padding so the yellow background wraps the heading and subtitle text area cleanly.

Create a Terms & Conditions page at frontend/src/pages/TermsAndConditions.tsx. The page should include a hero section with the heading 'Terms & Conditions', a last-updated date, and well-structured content sections covering: acceptance of terms, use of services, intellectual property, limitation of liability, governing law (India), and contact information for YMW Compliance Services LLP (Dhanbad, Jharkhand). Style using the dark navy (#0a1628) background, golden yellow (#f5c518) headings/accents, and white body text consistent with the site theme. Include a FreeConsultationSection above the footer.

Create a Privacy Policy page at frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx. The page should include a hero section with heading 'Privacy Policy', a last-updated date, and content sections covering: what personal data is collected (name, phone, email, service queries), how data is used (consultation follow-up, service delivery), data storage and security, third-party sharing policy, user rights, cookies policy, and contact details for YMW Compliance Services LLP. Style consistent with the dark navy (#0a1628) + golden yellow (#f5c518) theme. Include a FreeConsultationSection above the footer.

Create a Refund Policy page at frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx. The page should include a hero section with heading 'Refund Policy', a last-updated date, and content sections covering: eligibility for refunds, non-refundable services, refund request process and timeline, government fee non-refundability, and contact information. Style consistent with the dark navy (#0a1628) + golden yellow (#f5c518) theme. Include a FreeConsultationSection above the footer.

Create a Confidentiality Policy page at frontend/src/pages/ConfidentialityPolicy.tsx. The page should include a hero section with heading 'Confidentiality Policy', a last-updated date, and content sections covering: commitment to client confidentiality, what information is kept confidential (documents, business details, personal data), employee confidentiality obligations, exceptions to confidentiality (legal requirements), data retention, and contact details. Style consistent with the dark navy (#0a1628) + golden yellow (#f5c518) theme. Include a FreeConsultationSection above the footer.

Create a Disclaimer page at frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx. The page should include a hero section with heading 'Disclaimer', a last-updated date, and content sections covering: general disclaimer (information is for general guidance only), no legal advice disclaimer, accuracy of information, external links disclaimer, liability limitation, and contact information for YMW Compliance Services LLP. Style consistent with the dark navy (#0a1628) + golden yellow (#f5c518) theme. Include a FreeConsultationSection above the footer.

Register all five new legal/policy pages as lazy-loaded routes in frontend/src/App.tsx: /terms-and-conditions → TermsAndConditions, /privacy-policy → PrivacyPolicy, /refund-policy → RefundPolicy, /confidentiality-policy → ConfidentialityPolicy, /disclaimer → Disclaimer. Each route must be wrapped in the existing dark navy Layout component (with Navigation, Footer, FloatingCTA, and ConsultationPopup) consistent with all other page routes.

Update the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) to add a 'Legal' or 'Policies' column/section with links to all five new policy pages: Terms & Conditions (/terms-and-conditions), Privacy Policy (/privacy-policy), Refund Policy (/refund-policy), Confidentiality Policy (/confidentiality-policy), and Disclaimer (/disclaimer). Links should use golden yellow (#f5c518) accent color on hover, consistent with the existing footer link styling.

Add React Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for all new customer authentication and portal backend functions: (1) useSignupCustomer — useMutation calling signupCustomer; (2) useLoginCustomer — useMutation calling loginCustomer; (3) useCustomerProfile(customerId) — useQuery calling getCustomerProfile; (4) useSubmitServiceRequest — useMutation calling submitServiceRequest; (5) useGetServiceRequestsByCustomer(customerId) — useQuery; (6) useGetAllCustomers — useQuery (admin); (7) useGetAllServiceRequests — useQuery (admin). Manage authenticated customer session using React Context or sessionStorage: after a successful login, persist {customerId, fullName, email, businessName} in sessionStorage under key 'ymw_customer_session'. Create a useCustomerSession hook that reads/writes this session, and a clearCustomerSession function for logout.

Create a Customer Signup page at frontend/src/pages/CustomerSignup.tsx. The page should display a centered card form (dark navy #0a1628 background, golden yellow #f5c518 accents consistent with site theme) with the YMW Compliance Services branding at the top, heading 'Create Your Account', and the following fields: Full Name (text), Mobile Number (tel, 10-digit Indian mobile), Email Address (email), Password (password, min 8 chars), Business Name (text), and a golden yellow 'Create Account' submit button. On submit, call the useSignupCustomer mutation. On success, show a brief success message ('Account created successfully! Redirecting to login...') and automatically redirect to /customer-login after 2 seconds. On error (e.g., email already exists), display the error message inline below the form. Include a link at the bottom: 'Already have an account? Login here' linking to /customer-login. Apply dark navy background, white/light-gray text, and golden yellow accents. Inputs must be at least 44px tall for mobile. Include a FreeConsultationSection above the footer.

Create a Customer Login page at frontend/src/pages/CustomerLogin.tsx. The page should display a centered card form (dark navy background, golden yellow accents) with YMW Compliance Services branding, heading 'Welcome Back', subheading 'Login to your client portal', and the following fields: Email Address (email) and Password (password). Include a golden yellow 'Login' submit button. On submit, call the useLoginCustomer mutation. On success, persist the customer session via useCustomerSession and redirect to /customer-dashboard. On error, display 'Invalid email or password' inline. Include a link: 'New customer? Sign up here' linking to /customer-signup. Page must use dark navy background, white/light-gray text, and golden yellow accents consistent with the site theme. Inputs must be at least 44px tall. Include a FreeConsultationSection above the footer.

Create a protected Customer Dashboard page at frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx. On mount, check for an active customer session via useCustomerSession; if no session exists, immediately redirect to /customer-login. If session exists, render the dashboard with dark navy background and golden yellow accents. The dashboard should include: (1) A welcome banner: 'Welcome back, [fullName]!' with the customer's business name below it; (2) A Profile Info card showing: Full Name, Email, Mobile Number, Business Name, and a 'Logout' button that calls clearCustomerSession and redirects to /customer-login; (3) A 'Our Services' section with a dropdown or scrollable list box containing all 15 services (Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service, FSSAI License, Trademark Registration, Pollution Control Board, Tender Services, Digital Signature Certificate, Agreement & Contract, Small Business Support Service) — when a service is selected and 'Request Service' is clicked, call the useSubmitServiceRequest mutation with the customerId and selected service name, show a success confirmation with a reference ID; (4) An 'Upload Documents' button (styled in dark navy with golden yellow border) that opens a mailto link to ymwcomplianceservices@gmail.com with subject 'Document Upload - [businessName]' as a placeholder (actual file upload is not required); (5) A 'Contact Support via WhatsApp' button (green #22c55e) that links to https://wa.me/918102906339 opening in a new tab. Style all sections consistently with the dark navy + golden yellow theme. The page must be fully mobile responsive.

Create an Admin Panel page at frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx. The page should be accessible at /admin-panel and protected by a simple admin password check: on mount, if sessionStorage key 'ymw_admin_auth' is not set to 'true', show an admin login form with a single Password field and a 'Login as Admin' button. On submitting the correct hardcoded admin password (use 'YMWAdmin@2024'), set sessionStorage 'ymw_admin_auth' = 'true' and show the admin dashboard. The admin dashboard should have two tabs or sections: (1) 'All Customers' — fetches and displays a table (or responsive card list on mobile) of all registered customers using the useGetAllCustomers hook, showing columns: Customer ID (truncated), Full Name, Email, Mobile Number, Business Name, Registration Date; (2) 'Service Requests' — fetches and displays all service requests using the useGetAllServiceRequests hook, showing columns: Request ID (truncated), Customer Name/Email, Service Name, Notes, Submitted Date. Include a search/filter input above each table to filter by name or email. Include an 'Admin Logout' button that clears 'ymw_admin_auth' from sessionStorage. Style with dark navy background and golden yellow accents consistent with the site theme. The page must be fully mobile responsive.

Register all new customer portal pages as lazy-loaded routes in frontend/src/App.tsx: /customer-signup → CustomerSignup, /customer-login → CustomerLogin, /customer-dashboard → CustomerDashboard, /admin-panel → AdminPanel. Each route must be wrapped in the existing dark navy Layout component (with Navigation, Footer, FloatingCTA, and ConsultationPopup) consistent with all other page routes. Use React.lazy() and Suspense with the existing LoadingFallback component as the fallback.

Update the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) to add 'Sign Up' and 'Login' links in the navigation menu. 'Sign Up' should link to /customer-signup and 'Login' should link to /customer-login. These links should appear in both the desktop nav and the mobile hamburger menu. If a customer session is active (check sessionStorage key 'ymw_customer_session'), replace 'Sign Up' and 'Login' with a 'My Account' link pointing to /customer-dashboard. Style these links consistently with the existing nav link style (white text, golden yellow on hover/active). Do not remove or alter any existing nav links.

Update the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) to add 'Client Login' and 'Client Signup' links in the existing Quick Links or Support section, pointing to /customer-login and /customer-signup respectively. Use golden yellow (#f5c518) accent color on hover, consistent with existing footer link styling.

Update the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) to remove 'Social Media' from the primary navigation links entirely — it must not appear in either the desktop nav or the mobile hamburger menu.

Remove the separate standalone 'Login' link from the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx). The login option must only be accessible via the 'Sign Up' dropdown described in REQ-57, not as a top-level nav item. This applies to both the desktop nav and the mobile hamburger menu.

In the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx), replace the current 'Sign Up' and 'Login' individual links with a single golden yellow (#f5c518) primary CTA button labeled 'Sign Up' that opens a dropdown menu with exactly two options: (1) 'Sign Up' (primary option, styled prominently) which navigates to /customer-signup, and (2) 'Login' (secondary option below Sign Up) which navigates to /customer-login. The dropdown should appear on click or hover with a clean, professional dark navy (#0a1628) background and white text for the dropdown items, with golden yellow hover highlight. On desktop, position this button on the right side of the nav alongside the phone number. In the mobile hamburger menu, show the same two options (Sign Up and Login) as separate tappable rows without a dropdown — they can be rendered as direct links in the expanded mobile menu. If a customer session is active (sessionStorage key 'ymw_customer_session' is set), hide the Sign Up dropdown button entirely and instead show a 'My Account' link pointing to /customer-dashboard, consistent with the existing session-aware logic.

Ensure the final desktop Navigation layout in frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx follows this structure: Logo (YMW branding) on the far left; navigation links (Home, Services, About, Blog, Contact) centered in the middle; phone number (+91 8102906339) and the 'Sign Up' primary CTA button (with dropdown) on the far right. No other top-level links should appear between the centered nav links and the right-side elements. The layout must remain fully responsive — collapsing into the hamburger menu on mobile screens.

In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, update the useSubmitServiceRequest mutation so that before calling the backend submitServiceRequest function, it reads the current customer session from useCustomerSession (or directly from sessionStorage key 'ymw_customer_session') and automatically includes the customerId from the active session in the mutation payload. The mutation should throw or return an error with message 'No active session. Please log in.' if no valid session exists, rather than passing an empty or undefined customerId to the backend.

In frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx, fix the service request submission flow: when the user clicks 'Request Service', retrieve the customerId from the active customer session via useCustomerSession rather than from any local state or prop that may be undefined. Pass only the serviceName and notes to useSubmitServiceRequest (the hook itself provides customerId from the session per REQ-60). Additionally, ensure that on mount, if sessionStorage key 'ymw_customer_session' is absent or empty, the component immediately redirects to /customer-login. Display a clear inline error message if the service request submission fails.

In frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerSession.ts, ensure the setCustomerSession (or equivalent setter) function writes the full session object — including customerId, fullName, email, mobileNumber, and businessName — to sessionStorage under key 'ymw_customer_session' as a JSON string. Ensure the getCustomerSession (or equivalent getter) function parses and returns this object correctly. Verify that clearCustomerSession removes the key entirely. The session must persist across page navigations within the same browser tab.

In frontend/src/pages/CustomerLogin.tsx, after a successful loginCustomer mutation response, ensure the full customer profile (customerId, fullName, email, mobileNumber, businessName) returned by the backend is persisted to sessionStorage via the setCustomerSession function from useCustomerSession. Confirm the redirect to /customer-dashboard happens only after the session has been written to sessionStorage. If the session is not correctly persisted before redirect, the dashboard will treat the user as unauthenticated.

Update the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) to add a dropdown submenu under the 'Services' nav link. The dropdown must list all 15 services as first-level items only — no nested submenus inside any item: (1) Business Registration, (2) Tax & GST, (3) ISO Certification, (4) Compliance Service, (5) Government License, (6) Government Registration, (7) Labour Department, (8) Startup Service, (9) FSSAI License, (10) Trademark Registration, (11) Pollution Control Board, (12) Tender Services, (13) Digital Signature Certificate, (14) Agreement & Contract, (15) Small Business Support Service. Each dropdown item should link to /services (the main services page) — do not create individual sub-pages per service at this time. The dropdown should open on hover on desktop and on tap/click on mobile. Style the dropdown with the site's dark navy (#0a1628) background, white text, and golden yellow (#f5c518) hover highlight, consistent with the existing YMW Compliance Services branding. The 'Services' link must show a chevron/arrow indicator to signal the presence of a dropdown. On mobile (hamburger menu open), the 15 service items must be rendered as an expandable/collapsible accordion section or indented list under 'Services', not a floating overlay. Do not remove, alter, or reorder any existing nav links (Home, Services, About, Blog, Contact) or the right-side elements (phone number, Sign Up CTA button).

Update the Services page (frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx) to expand the following 8 service category cards with their complete sub-service lists. Do not change the existing card layout, design, icons, or grid structure — only add or replace the sub-service bullet/list items within each card:

1. Business Registration — replace any existing sub-items with: Private Limited Company Registration, Limited Liability Partnership (LLP) Registration, One Person Company Registration, Sole Proprietorship Registration, Partnership Firm Registration, Farmer Producer Company Registration, Section 8 Company Registration, NGO Registration, Society Registration, Charitable Trust Registration, CSR1 Registration, 12A Registration, 80G Registration, NGO Darpan Registration, Niti Aayog Registration.

2. Tax & GST — replace/add: GST Registration & Filing, ITR Filing Service, Professional Tax Registration, PT Return Filing Service, VAT Registration, VAT Return Filing, TDS Return Filing, GST LUT for Export, E-way Bill.

3. ISO Certification — replace/add: ISO Registration, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001, ISO 22000, ISO 27001, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, ISO 20000, ISO 13485, ISO 37001, ISO 39001, ISO 16001, ISO 2768-1.

4. Compliance Service — replace/add: MCA Compliance, Tax Audit, Statutory Audit, Income Tax Compliance, GST Compliance, Labour Compliance, Legal Compliance.

5. Government License — replace/add: Shop & Establishment License, PSARA License, Trade License, PESO License, CE Certification, CAPEXIL Certificate, GMP Certificate, AGMARK License, RCMC Certificate, AYUSH License, STPI License, Scrap Import Pollution NOC, Mining License.

6. Government Registration — replace/add: Import Export Code, ICEGATE Registration, AD Code Registration, LMPC Registration, MSME Registration, RERA Registration, Fire NOC, CDSCO Registration, NSIC Registration, APEDA Registration, BIS Certification, Barcode Registration, LEI Registration.

8. Startup Service — replace/add: Startup India Certificate, Startup India Seed Fund, Startup Tax Exemption (80 IAC), Startup Loan Assistance, Standup India Loan Scheme, Startup Tender Assistance, Project Report, Pitch Deck.

The remaining 7 service cards (FSSAI License, Trademark Registration, Pollution Control Board, Tender Services, Digital Signature Certificate, Agreement & Contract, Small Business Support Service) must remain unchanged. All sub-service items must be fully visible — no truncation, no 'show more' collapse, no items hidden. Maintain the dark navy (#0a1628) background and golden yellow (#f5c518) accent styling consistent with the site theme. The layout must remain fully responsive (single column on mobile < 640px, multi-column grid on larger screens).

Update the Services page (frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx) to replace the existing sub-service items in the following 7 service category cards with the exact lists provided below. Do not change the card layout, design, icons, grid structure, or any other section of the page — only replace the sub-service bullet/list items within each card:

1. FSSAI License — replace existing sub-items with: FSSAI Registration, FSSAI State License, FSSAI Central License, FPO Mark Certification, FSSAI Annual Return Filing.

2. Trademark Registration — replace existing sub-items with: Trademark Registration, Trademark Objection / Opposition Reply, Trademark Hearing, Brand Name Registration, Design Registration, Copyright Registration, Patent Registration.

3. Pollution Control Board — replace existing sub-items with: CGWA Water Boring, CTE / CTO Certificate, EPR Registration, Plastic Waste Authorization, E-Waste Recycling Authorization, Biomedical Waste License, Hazardous Waste Management NOC, Solid Waste Management Authorization, Battery Waste Management, Ferrous & Non-Ferrous Import Pollution NOC.

4. Tender Services — replace existing sub-items with: GeM Registration, Vendor Assessment, Vendor Assessment OEM, Catalogue Upload on GeM, IREPS Registration, E-Procurement Registration, State Procurement Portal Registration, MSTC / E-Auction Portal Registration, Coal E-Auction Service, Tender Submission Service.

All sub-service items must be fully visible — no truncation, no 'show more' collapse, no items hidden. Each card's height must adjust dynamically based on its number of sub-services with no empty whitespace. The remaining 8 service cards (Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service) must remain exactly unchanged. Maintain the dark navy (#0a1628) background and golden yellow (#f5c518) accent styling. The layout must remain fully responsive (single column on mobile < 640px, multi-column grid on larger screens).

In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, fix the service card grid layout so that all 15 service category cards align to the top of their grid cells. Use CSS grid with `items-start` (align-items: start) on the grid container so no card is pushed down relative to its row neighbors. Remove any fixed height or min-height set on individual service cards and allow each card to size dynamically based on its content.

In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, replace the existing card grid container with a clean responsive CSS grid using Tailwind classes: `grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6` (or equivalent). Ensure equal column widths, consistent row gap, and consistent column gap across all breakpoints. Remove any irregular margin or padding on individual cards that causes uneven spacing between cards.

In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, apply uniform internal padding to every service card using a consistent Tailwind padding class (e.g., `p-6`) applied identically to all cards. Ensure the padding on top, bottom, left, and right is equal for all cards. Remove any per-card padding overrides that differ between cards.

In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, enforce uniform vertical spacing between the internal elements of every service card in a consistent order: icon → title → description → sub-service list. Use consistent Tailwind spacing utilities (e.g., `mb-3` or `space-y-3`) applied identically across all 15 cards so the gap between each element pair is the same on every card.

In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, verify that the fixed layout, consistent padding, and top-aligned grid display correctly across desktop (≥ 1024px), tablet (640px–1023px), and mobile (< 640px) screen sizes. Ensure no card overflows, overlaps, or misaligns on any breakpoint. Maintain all existing dark navy (#0a1628) background, golden yellow (#f5c518) accent colors, card border/shadow styles, icons, and branding — only layout and spacing must change.

new_feature_requests.summary: About page
Services page with services showcase
Blog page with blog listing
Contact page
Grievance Section page with submission form
Social Media page with social media links
Signup page with Internet Identity authentication
Navigation linking all pages

Update Home page with: Hero Section (YMW Compliance Services title, India's #1 subtitle, Contact Us + WhatsApp Now buttons), About Preview section, Services Preview (15 services listed), Why Choose Us stats (20,000+ clients, 15+ years, 5-star rating), Contact Preview (phone/WhatsApp numbers, business hours)
Apply dark navy (#0a1628) + golden yellow (#f5c518) color scheme across entire website, matching user-provided screenshots

Store the free consultation form submissions from the Home page hero section in the Motoko backend. Add a new data type and stable storage for consultation requests containing: fullName (Text), phoneNumber (Text), selectedService (Text), cityState (Text), and a timestamp. Expose a submitConsultationRequest update function that stores the entry and returns a unique ID.
Keep background color (dark navy #0a1628) and font consistent across all pages — do not change them
Add a floating WhatsApp button visible on all pages linking to WhatsApp number 8102906339
Add a floating 'Call Now' button visible on all pages linking to phone number 92792 42122
Add a popup/modal consultation form that appears on page load or after a delay, with the same fields as the hero consultation form
Embed a free consultation form on every page (About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance, Social Media, Signup) — not just the Home page hero
SEO optimization for India searches: add meta tags, Open Graph tags, structured data (JSON-LD), sitemap, and India-targeted keywords across all pages
Performance/fast loading optimization: lazy loading images, code splitting, minification, and Lighthouse score improvements
Mobile optimization: ensure all pages and components are fully responsive and touch-friendly across all screen sizes
Google Ads landing page readiness: add conversion tracking hooks, clear CTAs, fast load, and structured layout suitable for Google Ads campaigns targeting compliance/registration services in India
Fix services display — all 15 services must be fully visible on the Services page and Services Preview section; none should be hidden or cut off
Update 'Why Choose Us' stats to: 15,000+ Happy Clients, 100+ Services Offered, 12+ Years Experience, 5* Client Rating

Add 'Our Strengths' section on Home page: heading 'Why 15,000+ Businesses Trust YMW', subheading 'We bring expertise, speed, and transparency to every compliance need', with 6 strength cards: Expert Professionals, Pan India Service, Affordable Pricing, Fast Processing, End-to-End Support, 100% Online Process

Update the 'Get in Touch' / CTA section on the Home page to match the user's screenshot exactly: heading 'Ready to Start Your Business Journey?', subheading '100% free consultation, no obligations', three CTA buttons: 'Get Free Consultation' (yellow), 'Call: +91 8102906339 / 9279242122' (dark outline), 'WhatsApp Us' (green), and three trust badges: '✓ No registration fee', '✓ Expert advice', '✓ Response within 30 minutes'. Must use the same font and color scheme as the rest of the site (dark navy background, golden yellow accent, white text).
Change the background of the 'Get in Touch' / CTA section writeup/text area to yellow (golden yellow #f5c518) for highlighting
Add legal/policy pages: Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy, Confidentiality Policy, and Disclaimer — accessible from the footer or navigation
Customer Signup page with fields: Full Name, Mobile Number, Email Address, Password, Business Name — redirects to Login page after successful signup
Customer Login page with Email and Password fields — redirects to Customer Dashboard after successful login
Protected Customer Dashboard showing: welcome message with customer name, profile info, service selection list (all 15 services), Upload Documents button, Contact Support via WhatsApp button
Persistent customer accounts stored in Motoko backend — customers can login anytime; secure authentication with protected dashboard access (only logged-in users can access dashboard)
Admin Panel to view all registered customers, customer details, and customer service requests
Add Signup and Login links to website navigation menu; connect dashboard access after login

Extend the Motoko backend to store customer accounts with fields: fullName (Text), mobileNumber (Text), email (Text), passwordHash (Text), businessName (Text), createdAt (Int), and a unique customerId (Nat). Add stable storage (HashMap or TrieMap) for customer accounts keyed by email. Expose the following update/query functions: (1) signupCustomer(fullName, mobileNumber, email, password, businessName) → returns variant {#ok: Text; #err: Text} where Text is the customerId on success or an error message (e.g., 'Email already registered'); (2) loginCustomer(email, password) → returns variant {#ok: CustomerProfile; #err: Text} where CustomerProfile contains customerId, fullName, email, mobileNumber, businessName, createdAt; (3) getCustomerProfile(customerId: Text) → returns ?CustomerProfile; (4) getAllCustomers() → returns [CustomerProfile] (admin-only, restrict to a hardcoded admin principal or an isAdmin check); (5) submitServiceRequest(customerId: Text, serviceName: Text, notes: Text) → returns variant {#ok: Text; #err: Text} where the returned Text is a serviceRequestId; (6) getServiceRequestsByCustomer(customerId: Text) → returns [ServiceRequest] where ServiceRequest contains requestId, customerId, serviceName, notes, createdAt; (7) getAllServiceRequests() → returns [ServiceRequest] (admin-only). Store passwords as a simple hash (use a deterministic Text transformation since Motoko lacks bcrypt — concatenate a fixed salt string with the password and store it, comparing the same way on login). Do not use Internet Identity for this flow.

Update header navigation: remove 'Social Media' link and separate 'Login' link; add single 'Sign Up' primary CTA button with dropdown (Sign Up → /signup, Login → /login); nav links: Home, Services, About, Blog, Contact; phone number on right; logo on left

In the Motoko backend (backend/main.mo), update the submitServiceRequest function to accept the customerId as a parameter (as it currently does) and authenticate the caller by verifying that the customerId exists in the customers stable storage and that the provided customerId corresponds to a real registered customer — do NOT reject calls based on the IC caller principal being anonymous. The function must look up the customer record by customerId (Text) in the stable HashMap/TrieMap and return #err("Customer not found") if not found, or proceed with storing the service request if the customer record exists. Remove or replace any guard that rejects calls from anonymous IC principals (i.e., remove any check of the form `if (caller == Principal.anonymous())`), since this customer auth system uses email/password sessions, not Internet Identity principals.

Add a dropdown to the 'Services' nav link listing all 15 services as first-level submenu items (no deeper nesting yet): Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service, FSSAI License, Trademark Registration, Pollution Control Board, Tender Services, Digital Signature Certificate, Agreement & Contract, Small Business Support Service. Dropdown must work on desktop and mobile, with professional YMW-branded styling.

Expand Services page category cards with detailed sub-services: Business Registration (15 sub-services), Tax & GST (9), ISO Certification (13), Compliance Service (7), Government License (13), Government Registration (13), Labour Department (11), Startup Service (8). Maintain existing layout/design — only add sub-service lists under each category card.

Expand remaining 7 Services page category cards with detailed sub-services: FSSAI License (5), Trademark Registration (7), Pollution Control Board (10), Tender Services (10), Digital Signature Certificate (5), Agreement & Contract (7), Small Business Support Service (7). Cards must auto-height based on content, no empty space.

Fix Services page card layout: align all cards to top, remove fixed heights, use dynamic content-based height, consistent responsive grid with equal column/row spacing, uniform internal padding, no extra margins causing gaps, uniform spacing between icon/title/description/service list across desktop/tablet/mobile
